title.zh: TikTok美国剥离法案：平台、数据与国家安全的合流
title.en: TikTok U.S. divestiture law: platform, data, and national security converge

summary.zh: 美国以国家安全为核心叙事要求剥离或停止运营，显示大型平台的算法、数据与控制权结构会同时触发政治和法律风险。
summary.en: The United States framed divestiture or shutdown around national security, showing how algorithmic control, data, and ownership structures can trigger political and legal risk together.

facts.zh: 美国最高法院于2025年1月维持《保护美国人免受外国对手控制应用程序法》适用于TikTok的合宪性，后续执行期限和交易谈判仍具有政治不确定性。
facts.en: In January 2025 the U.S. Supreme Court upheld application of the Protecting Americans from Foreign Adversary Controlled Applications Act to TikTok, while later deadlines and deal negotiations remained politically uncertain.

legalIssues: 国家安全审查 / national security review
言论与数据治理 / speech and data governance

complianceLessons.zh: 面向海外市场的平台架构应提前准备控制权、数据隔离、算法治理、透明度和政府沟通方案，不能把国家安全风险当成普通合规问题处理。
complianceLessons.en: Platforms entering foreign markets should prepare ownership, data-separation, algorithm governance, transparency, and government-engagement plans before national security risk becomes a crisis.

sources.label: U.S. Supreme Court opinion, TikTok Inc. v. Garland
U.S. Congress, PAFACA text

title.zh: TikTok爱尔兰DPC罚款：中欧数据访问与透明度风险
title.en: TikTok Irish DPC fine: China access and transfer transparency risk

summary.zh: 爱尔兰数据保护委员会对TikTok作出5.3亿欧元罚款决定，核心在于EEA用户数据向中国访问/转移的保障措施和透明度。
summary.en: Ireland's Data Protection Commission imposed a EUR 530 million fine focused on safeguards and transparency for EEA user data accessed from or transferred to China.

facts.zh: 监管机关认为TikTok未能证明其向中国转移EEA用户个人数据时提供了等同欧盟法要求的保护，并要求整改。
facts.en: The regulator found TikTok had not shown that EEA user personal data transferred to China received protection essentially equivalent to EU law and ordered remediation.

complianceLessons.zh: 跨境数据项目需要能向监管者解释数据位置、访问主体、传输机制、补充措施和实际日志，而不仅是一份隐私政策。
complianceLessons.en: Cross-border data projects need regulator-ready proof of data location, access actors, transfer mechanisms, supplementary safeguards, and access logs, not only a privacy policy.

sources.label: Irish Data Protection Commission press releases

title.zh: TikTok欧盟DSA调查：广告库、系统性风险与平台透明度
title.en: TikTok EU DSA investigation: ad repositories, systemic risk, and platform transparency

summary.zh: 欧盟DSA对超大型在线平台提出广告透明、风险评估和研究者访问要求，TikTok等平台被持续纳入高强度监管。
summary.en: The EU DSA imposes ad transparency, risk assessment, and researcher-access duties on very large online platforms, keeping TikTok under intensive regulatory scrutiny.

facts.zh: 欧盟委员会围绕TikTok的广告库和平台透明度开展执法，显示平台合规已经从内容治理扩展到证据可访问性。
facts.en: European Commission enforcement around TikTok's ad repository and transparency shows that platform compliance now extends from content governance to auditable evidence access.

legalIssues: DSA超大平台义务 / DSA VLOP duties

complianceLessons.zh: 平台必须把广告库、商家治理、算法说明、投诉处理和风险评估做成持续可审计的系统。
complianceLessons.en: Platforms must make ad repositories, trader governance, algorithm explanations, complaint handling, and risk assessments continuously auditable.

sources.label: European Commission Digital Services Act enforcement

title.zh: Temu欧盟DSA初步认定：非法产品和平台风险治理
title.en: Temu EU DSA preliminary findings: illegal products and platform-risk governance

summary.zh: 欧盟委员会围绕Temu平台非法产品风险作出初步认定，显示低价SKU和第三方商家模式必须配套强治理能力。
summary.en: The Commission's preliminary findings on illegal product risk at Temu show that low-price SKU scale and third-party trader models require strong governance systems.

facts.zh: 监管关注商家可追溯、商品安全、重复上架、风险评估和消费者保护；DSA重大违规可触发最高全球年营业额6%的罚款。
facts.en: The regulatory focus includes trader traceability, product safety, repeat listings, risk assessment, and consumer protection; serious DSA breaches can trigger fines up to 6% of global annual turnover.

complianceLessons.zh: 跨境电商平台要把选品测试、上架审核、商家身份、召回和投诉处理作为核心基础设施，而非后台客服流程。
complianceLessons.en: E-commerce platforms should treat product testing, listing review, trader identity, recalls, and complaint handling as core infrastructure, not back-office support.

sources.label: European Commission, Temu DSA preliminary findings

title.zh: 美国终止中国/香港小额包裹de minimis待遇
title.en: U.S. ending of China/Hong Kong de minimis treatment

summary.zh: 美国终止中国及香港低值包裹de minimis待遇，削弱依赖小包直邮和低值申报的跨境电商模式。
summary.en: The United States ended de minimis treatment for low-value shipments from China and Hong Kong, weakening e-commerce models built on low-value direct mail.

facts.zh: 规则变化把税费、申报准确性、原产地和产品合规推到商业模式中心，Temu、Shein及第三方卖家均受影响。
facts.en: The change brings duties, declaration accuracy, origin, and product compliance to the center of the business model, affecting Temu, Shein, and third-party sellers.

complianceLessons.zh: 平台和卖家需要重新测算含税价格、分类编码、原产地文件、退货和召回成本，避免把税关问题留给物流商。
complianceLessons.en: Platforms and sellers need to recalculate landed prices, classifications, origin records, return and recall costs, instead of leaving customs risk to logistics providers.

sources.label: U.S. CBP de minimis guidance hub

title.zh: Shein欧盟平台监管：超大型平台义务与消费品安全
title.en: Shein EU platform regulation: VLOP duties and consumer-product safety

summary.zh: Shein作为超大型在线平台面临DSA下的系统性风险、商品安全、商家可追溯和消费者保护要求。
summary.en: As a very large online platform, Shein faces DSA duties on systemic risk, product safety, trader traceability, and consumer protection.

facts.zh: 欧盟对平台、消费者保护和商品安全的多工具监管使快时尚跨境电商必须同时证明商品、商家和供应链可控。
facts.en: EU multi-tool regulation of platforms, consumer protection, and product safety means fast-fashion e-commerce must prove control over products, traders, and supply chains.

complianceLessons.zh: 平台合规应覆盖供应商准入、化学品/纺织品标准、广告声明、退货投诉和召回机制。
complianceLessons.en: Platform compliance should cover supplier onboarding, chemicals/textile standards, advertising claims, returns and complaints, and recall mechanisms.

sources.label: European Commission designated VLOPs and VLOSEs

title.zh: AliExpress欧盟DSA程序：平台市场的高风险商品治理
title.en: AliExpress EU DSA proceedings: high-risk product governance in platform marketplaces

summary.zh: 欧盟对AliExpress启动DSA程序，关注非法商品、内容审核、投诉机制、广告透明和研究者访问等义务。
summary.en: The EU opened DSA proceedings into AliExpress, focusing on illegal goods, content moderation, complaint mechanisms, ad transparency, and researcher access.

facts.zh: 该案说明跨境平台不能只强调连接商家和消费者，而要对商品、广告、推荐和风险评估承担主动治理义务。
facts.en: The case shows that cross-border marketplaces cannot merely connect traders and consumers; they must actively govern products, ads, recommendations, and risk assessment.

complianceLessons.zh: 平台应建立跨品类商品风险分级、重复违规商家处置、监管数据接口和合规审计痕迹。
complianceLessons.en: Platforms should build category-level product-risk grading, repeat-offender handling, regulator-ready data interfaces, and compliance audit trails.

sources.label: European Commission, AliExpress DSA proceedings

title.zh: DeepSeek意大利数据案：AI服务的数据告知和境外存储
title.en: DeepSeek Italy data case: notices and overseas storage for AI services

summary.zh: 意大利数据保护机构对DeepSeek采取行动，焦点包括用户数据收集、告知、存储地点和向中国传输。
summary.en: Italy's data protection authority acted against DeepSeek, focusing on data collection, notices, storage location, and transfers to China.

facts.zh: 该案把生成式AI的隐私政策、训练/推理数据、服务提供主体和境外访问放入监管审查。
facts.en: The case places generative AI privacy notices, training/inference data, service-entity structure, and overseas access under regulatory scrutiny.

legalIssues: AI数据处理 / AI data processing

complianceLessons.zh: AI出海要准备模型数据说明、用户权利响应、数据保留期限、处理者/控制者角色和本地监管问答材料。
complianceLessons.en: AI expansion should prepare model-data explanations, user-rights workflows, retention periods, controller/processor roles, and local regulator Q&A files.

sources.label: Garante Privacy, DeepSeek notices

company: BYD, SAIC, Geely and other Chinese BEV exporters

title.zh: 欧盟中国电动汽车反补贴税：产业政策成为市场准入门槛
title.en: EU Chinese EV countervailing duties: industrial policy as a market-access gate

summary.zh: 欧盟对中国纯电动汽车征收五年期反补贴税，企业的成本、补贴、价格和供应链安排均被纳入调查。
summary.en: The EU imposed five-year countervailing duties on Chinese battery electric vehicles, scrutinizing costs, subsidies, prices, and supply-chain arrangements.

facts.zh: 该案成为中国产业政策、绿色转型和贸易救济工具冲突的标志性案例。
facts.en: The case became a landmark clash between Chinese industrial policy, green transition, and trade-remedy tools.

complianceLessons.zh: 新能源企业出海要维护补贴台账、成本模型、关联交易、产地和公共叙事，避免立案后才补证据。
complianceLessons.en: New-energy exporters should maintain subsidy registers, cost models, related-party transaction files, origin records, and public narratives before investigations begin.

sources.label: European Commission press release IP/24/5581

title.zh: Nuctech欧盟外国补贴条例案：突检与补贴审查
title.en: Nuctech EU Foreign Subsidies Regulation case: inspections and subsidy review

summary.zh: 欧盟在外国补贴条例下对Nuctech开展检查，显示补贴审查已进入企业办公室、电子资料和公共采购场景。
summary.en: EU inspections of Nuctech under the Foreign Subsidies Regulation show subsidy review moving into company premises, electronic records, and public procurement contexts.

facts.zh: 该案提示中企在欧公共采购和安全设备领域要准备突检、数据保全、法律特权和补贴资料说明。
facts.en: The case warns Chinese firms in EU public procurement and security equipment sectors to prepare for dawn raids, document preservation, privilege, and subsidy explanations.

complianceLessons.zh: 大型投标和并购应提前建立政府资金、贷款、税惠、土地和能源安排的披露口径。
complianceLessons.en: Large bids and acquisitions should prepare disclosure positions for state funding, loans, tax benefits, land, and energy arrangements.

sources.label: European Commission, Foreign Subsidies Regulation
Court of Justice of the EU case-law search

title.zh: UFLPA光伏供应链执法：可追溯性成为清关条件
title.en: UFLPA solar supply-chain enforcement: traceability as a customs condition

summary.zh: 美国UFLPA以可反驳推定方式限制与新疆相关商品进口，光伏、多晶硅和电子供应链长期处于高风险区。
summary.en: The U.S. UFLPA restricts Xinjiang-linked imports through a rebuttable presumption, keeping solar, polysilicon, and electronics supply chains in high-risk territory.

facts.zh: CBP统计看板持续披露扣留、放行和拒绝数据，企业需按批次提交供应链证据。
facts.en: CBP's statistics dashboard reports detentions, releases, and denials, requiring firms to produce batch-level supply-chain evidence.

legalIssues: 强迫劳动推定 / forced-labour presumption

complianceLessons.zh: 企业不能只审一级供应商，应追溯至关键原料和矿产来源，形成可随订单调用的证据包。
complianceLessons.en: Companies cannot stop at tier-one suppliers; they should trace critical materials and minerals and maintain order-level evidence packs.

sources.label: CBP UFLPA statistics dashboard
DHS UFLPA Entity List

title.zh: UFLPA服装与电商风险：小包模式也需要供应链证据
title.en: UFLPA apparel and e-commerce risk: small parcels still need supply-chain proof

summary.zh: 服装、棉花、纺织品和电商小包并不会因订单小而免于强迫劳动和原产地证明压力。
summary.en: Apparel, cotton, textiles, and e-commerce parcels are not exempt from forced-labour and origin proof merely because orders are small.

facts.zh: 随着de minimis变化和UFLPA执法数字化，平台商家需要同时准备税关和人权证据。
facts.en: As de minimis rules change and UFLPA enforcement digitizes, platform sellers need customs and human-rights evidence together.

legalIssues: 平台商家责任 / marketplace trader responsibility

complianceLessons.zh: 跨境卖家需要在选品前确认材料来源、供应商用工和平台上架资料，而不是在扣货后补文件。
complianceLessons.en: Cross-border sellers need to confirm material origin, supplier labour practices, and listing evidence before product selection, not after detention.

sources.label: CBP UFLPA operational guidance

title.zh: BYD巴西劳工案：承包商用工变成集团声誉与刑事风险
title.en: BYD Brazil labour case: contractor labour becomes group reputation and criminal risk

summary.zh: 巴西检方围绕工厂建设工人的“类奴役条件”和人口贩运指控采取行动，凸显承包商现场管理的出海风险。
summary.en: Brazilian prosecutors acted over allegations of slavery-like conditions and human trafficking involving construction workers, highlighting contractor-site risk abroad.

facts.zh: 案件涉及中国工人、宿舍、护照、工资和分包管理，说明海外建设项目不能把劳工合规外包给承包商。
facts.en: The case involved Chinese workers, dormitories, passports, wages, and subcontractor management, showing that overseas projects cannot outsource labour compliance to contractors.

legalIssues: 当地劳动法 / local labour law

complianceLessons.zh: 海外开工前应完成劳动合同、宿舍、安全、护照保管、工时工资和申诉渠道审计，并保留整改证据。
complianceLessons.en: Before site launch, companies should audit employment contracts, dormitories, safety, passport custody, working time, wages, and grievance channels, preserving remediation proof.

sources.label: Brazil Public Labour Prosecutor's Office
Reuters coverage of BYD Brazil labour allegations

title.zh: 欧盟强迫劳动产品禁令：从ESG承诺到市场禁入
title.en: EU Forced Labour Regulation: from ESG pledge to market ban

summary.zh: 欧盟强迫劳动产品条例生效后，将从2027年起允许禁止相关产品在欧盟市场销售和出口。
summary.en: The EU Forced Labour Regulation will allow authorities, from 2027, to ban products made with forced labour from being sold in or exported from the EU.

facts.zh: 义务主体虽然可能是进口商或平台，但证明压力会沿合同传导给中国供应商。
facts.en: Even when obligations formally sit with importers or platforms, proof pressure will travel contractually back to Chinese suppliers.

complianceLessons.zh: 供应商要提前准备劳工尽调、招聘中介管理、投诉渠道和补救记录，不能等买方问卷到来才整理。
complianceLessons.en: Suppliers should prepare labour diligence, recruiter controls, grievance channels, and remediation records before buyer questionnaires arrive.

sources.label: European Commission, Forced Labour Regulation

industry: Steel, aluminium, cement, fertilisers, hydrogen, electricity

title.zh: 欧盟CBAM正式期：碳数据进入清关与合同
title.en: EU CBAM definitive period: carbon data enters customs and contracts

summary.zh: CBAM正式期使钢铁、铝、水泥等产品的碳数据成为进口和价格谈判的重要变量。
summary.en: CBAM's definitive period makes carbon data for steel, aluminium, cement, and other products a customs and pricing variable.

facts.zh: 中国出口商即使不是法定义务主体，也需要向欧盟进口商提供可验证的嵌入排放数据。
facts.en: Chinese exporters may not be the formal obligors, but they must provide verifiable embedded-emissions data to EU importers.

complianceLessons.zh: 企业应建立产品级碳数据、第三方核证、能源结构和合同调价机制。
complianceLessons.en: Companies should build product-level carbon data, third-party verification, energy-mix records, and contract price-adjustment clauses.

sources.label: European Commission, CBAM

title.zh: CSDDD传导效应：欧盟客户把尽调义务写进供应合同
title.en: CSDDD pass-through: EU customers write diligence duties into supply contracts

summary.zh: 欧盟企业可持续尽调指令要求大企业识别并处理人权和环境影响，压力会通过合同、问卷和审计传导给中企供应商。
summary.en: The CSDDD requires large companies to address human-rights and environmental impacts, with pressure passing to Chinese suppliers through contracts, questionnaires, and audits.

facts.zh: 即使中国供应商不直接落入指令范围，也可能因客户义务被要求披露、整改和接受审计。
facts.en: Even Chinese suppliers outside direct scope may face disclosure, remediation, and audit demands because of customer obligations.

legalIssues: 人权尽调 / human-rights due diligence

complianceLessons.zh: 供应商应把客户尽调问卷变成内部制度：供应商准入、劳工、环境、投诉、整改和董事会监督。
complianceLessons.en: Suppliers should convert customer diligence questionnaires into internal systems: onboarding, labour, environment, grievance, remediation, and board oversight.

sources.label: European Commission, Corporate sustainability due diligence

company: U.S. investors and China-linked technology targets

title.zh: 美国对外投资安全规则：资本流向也被纳入技术管制
title.en: U.S. outbound investment security: capital flows enter technology controls

summary.zh: 美国对涉及中国半导体、量子和AI领域的特定投资设置禁止或申报机制，扩大技术遏制工具箱。
summary.en: The United States created prohibition and notification rules for certain China-related investments in semiconductors, quantum, and AI, expanding the technology-control toolkit.

facts.zh: 中国技术企业融资、合资、基金和技术合作需要考虑美国投资人、美国人参与和受管活动边界。
facts.en: Chinese technology companies' financing, joint ventures, funds, and technology cooperation must consider U.S. investor, U.S. person, and covered-activity boundaries.

legalIssues: 对外投资审查 / outbound investment review
美国人参与 / U.S. person involvement

complianceLessons.zh: 融资和合作协议应加入投资人身份、技术用途、通知义务、终止权和合规协助条款。
complianceLessons.en: Financing and cooperation agreements should include investor-identity, technology-use, notification, termination, and compliance-assistance clauses.

sources.label: U.S. Treasury, Outbound Investment Security Program

title.zh: BIS半导体出口管制更新：设备、软件和实体清单共同收紧
title.en: BIS semiconductor controls: equipment, software, and Entity List tightening

summary.zh: 美国商务部持续收紧先进半导体制造设备、软件工具和实体清单，强化对中国先进芯片能力的限制。
summary.en: The U.S. Commerce Department tightened controls on advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment, software tools, and Entity List designations to restrict China's advanced chip capacity.

facts.zh: 高科技企业的销售、维修、云端访问和技术支持都可能因美国成分、软件或人员参与而触发许可要求。
facts.en: Sales, maintenance, cloud access, and technical support may trigger licensing requirements because of U.S. content, software, or personnel involvement.

complianceLessons.zh: 报价前必须完成物项分类、美国成分判断、客户筛查、最终用途审查和再出口限制。
complianceLessons.en: Before quotation, companies must complete item classification, U.S.-content analysis, party screening, end-use review, and re-export restrictions.

sources.label: U.S. BIS rules and regulations
Federal Register, BIS export administration regulations

title.zh: H20/MI308许可风险：合规版芯片也会再次受限
title.en: H20/MI308 licensing risk: compliant chips can be restricted again

summary.zh: 美国对面向中国市场设计的AI芯片继续调整许可要求，说明“合规版产品”并非稳定安全港。
summary.en: U.S. licensing changes for AI chips designed for the China market show that a 'compliant product' is not a stable safe harbour.

facts.zh: 企业若依赖某一代合规参数设计产品，应预设规则再次变化、库存受限和客户交付中断情形。
facts.en: Firms relying on a generation of compliant parameters should plan for further rule changes, inventory restrictions, and customer-delivery disruption.

complianceLessons.zh: 合同要包含出口许可协助、规则变化解除权、替代产品和不可抗力/制裁条款。
complianceLessons.en: Contracts should include export-licence cooperation, rule-change termination rights, substitute products, and sanctions/force majeure clauses.

sources.label: U.S. BIS export controls
NVIDIA SEC filings

title.zh: DJI 1260H名单诉讼：安全标签的商业后果
title.en: DJI 1260H litigation: commercial consequences of security labels

summary.zh: DJI挑战被美国国防部列入“中国军工企业”名单，名单虽不等同制裁，但会影响采购、融资、保险、客户信心和声誉。
summary.en: DJI challenged its inclusion on the U.S. Defense Department's Chinese military companies list; even when not a sanctions list, it affects procurement, finance, insurance, customer confidence, and reputation.

facts.zh: 安全标签化风险说明企业需要准备控制权、军民用途、客户结构、研发合作和政府沟通证据。
facts.en: Security-label risk requires evidence on control, civil/military use, customer profile, R&D cooperation, and government engagement.

complianceLessons.zh: 被列名企业要快速建立诉讼、公共沟通、客户安抚和替代市场方案，不宜只依赖法律抗辩。
complianceLessons.en: Listed firms need litigation, public communications, customer assurance, and alternative-market plans; legal argument alone is insufficient.

sources.label: U.S. Department of Defense, 1260H list

title.zh: 禾赛科技1260H名单争议：智能汽车供应链的安全化
title.en: Hesai 1260H dispute: securitization of smart-vehicle supply chains

summary.zh: 激光雷达和智能汽车零部件企业被纳入安全名单争议，显示汽车供应链正在被数据、军民两用和基础设施叙事重新定义。
summary.en: LiDAR and smart-vehicle component firms facing security-list disputes show automotive supply chains being redefined by data, dual-use, and infrastructure narratives.

facts.zh: 即便产品主要面向民用汽车，也可能因传感器、地图、数据和投资背景受到国家安全审查。
facts.en: Even products for civilian vehicles may face national-security scrutiny because of sensors, maps, data, and investment background.

legalIssues: 智能汽车数据 / vehicle data

complianceLessons.zh: 智能硬件企业应提前准备民用用途、数据边界、客户分布、治理结构和第三方审计材料。
complianceLessons.en: Smart-hardware firms should prepare civil-use, data-boundary, customer-distribution, governance, and third-party audit evidence early.

sources.label: U.S. Department of Defense, Chinese Military Companies

company: Huawei, ZTE, Hikvision, Dahua and others

title.zh: FCC Covered List：通信和安防设备的准入封锁
title.en: FCC Covered List: market-access blockage for telecoms and surveillance equipment

summary.zh: 美国FCC将若干中国通信和安防企业列入国家安全相关Covered List，并限制相关设备授权。
summary.en: The U.S. FCC placed several Chinese telecoms and surveillance companies on its national-security Covered List and restricted equipment authorizations.

facts.zh: 名单化会影响认证、政府采购、客户合同、保险和售后服务，并可能被其他国家监管者引用。
facts.en: Listing affects certification, government procurement, customer contracts, insurance, and after-sales service, and may be cited by regulators elsewhere.

complianceLessons.zh: 硬件企业出海应建立产品认证、网络安全说明、供应链安全、客户分层和替代市场策略。
complianceLessons.en: Hardware exporters should build product-certification, cybersecurity, supply-chain security, customer-tiering, and alternative-market strategies.

sources.label: FCC Covered List
FCC equipment authorization order

title.zh: Lenovo/InterDigital FRAND争议：全球费率与禁令风险
title.en: Lenovo/InterDigital FRAND dispute: global rates and injunction risk

summary.zh: 英国FRAND争议显示，标准必要专利许可费率、谈判记录和全球组合许可会成为出海硬件企业的核心风险。
summary.en: The UK FRAND dispute shows that SEP royalty rates, negotiation records, and global portfolio licensing are core risks for hardware exporters.

facts.zh: 法院可审查全球许可费率和双方谈判行为，禁令威胁会影响产品上市与和解策略。
facts.en: Courts may examine global licence rates and party conduct in negotiations, while injunction threats affect launch and settlement strategy.

complianceLessons.zh: 企业应保存许可谈判记录、可比协议分析、标准参与证明和产品路线图，避免被动应诉。
complianceLessons.en: Companies should preserve licence negotiation records, comparable-agreement analyses, standards participation proof, and product roadmaps before litigation.

sources.label: UK High Court, InterDigital v Lenovo FRAND judgment

title.zh: 小米印度FEMA案：特许权使用费、资金流与本地执法
title.en: Xiaomi India FEMA case: royalties, fund flows, and local enforcement

summary.zh: 印度执法机构围绕小米印度向境外支付特许权使用费等问题采取资产冻结措施，显示资金流和税务架构的本地执法风险。
summary.en: Indian enforcement action around Xiaomi India's overseas royalty payments and asset freezing shows local enforcement risk in fund flows and tax structures.

facts.zh: 该案提示电子消费品企业在印度等市场要同步管理转让定价、特许权使用费、外汇、税务和公共沟通。
facts.en: The case warns consumer-electronics firms in markets such as India to manage transfer pricing, royalties, foreign exchange, tax, and public communications together.

complianceLessons.zh: 跨境服务费和IP许可费应有真实服务、独立交易定价、董事会文件和税务申报一致性。
complianceLessons.en: Cross-border service and IP licence fees need real services, arm's-length pricing, board documents, and tax-return consistency.

sources.label: India Enforcement Directorate press releases

title.zh: vivo印度执法案：分销结构、资金流与刑事调查
title.en: Vivo India enforcement case: distribution structure, fund flows, and criminal investigation

summary.zh: 印度对vivo相关主体的执法行动显示，销售网络、分销商、资金流和合规文件可被放入刑事调查框架。
summary.en: Indian enforcement actions involving Vivo-related entities show how sales networks, distributors, fund flows, and compliance records can enter a criminal-investigation frame.

facts.zh: 快速扩张市场中的复杂分销结构需要穿透受益所有人、发票、银行流水和关联交易。
facts.en: Complex distribution structures in fast-growth markets require beneficial-owner, invoice, bank-flow, and related-party transaction transparency.

complianceLessons.zh: 分销商准入和持续监测应覆盖受益所有人、税务登记、真实交易、异常返利和付款路径。
complianceLessons.en: Distributor onboarding and monitoring should cover beneficial ownership, tax registration, real transactions, unusual rebates, and payment routes.

sources.label: India Enforcement Directorate press releases

title.zh: FCPA 2025执法调整：风向会变，第三方红线不会消失
title.en: FCPA 2025 enforcement adjustment: priorities may shift, third-party red lines remain

summary.zh: 美国FCPA执法政策在2025年出现调整，但海外反腐风险仍来自美国、英国、法国、世界银行和东道国多法域叠加。
summary.en: U.S. FCPA enforcement policy shifted in 2025, but overseas anti-corruption risk remains multi-jurisdictional across the U.S., UK, France, World Bank, and host states.

facts.zh: 政府项目、国企客户、通关代理、顾问和经销商仍是中企出海反腐高风险接触点。
facts.en: Government projects, SOE customers, customs brokers, consultants, and distributors remain high-risk touchpoints for Chinese companies abroad.

complianceLessons.zh: 不要把某一国家阶段性执法调整理解为可以放松合规；第三方尽调、费用审批和审计权仍是基本盘。
complianceLessons.en: Do not read one country's enforcement reprioritization as permission to relax compliance; third-party due diligence, expense approval, and audit rights remain essential.

sources.label: U.S. DOJ FCPA resources
White House presidential actions

title.zh: FEPA需求侧贿赂：外国官员索贿也进入美国刑事工具箱
title.en: FEPA demand-side bribery: foreign official solicitation enters the U.S. criminal toolkit

summary.zh: 美国FEPA补上外国官员索贿、收贿一侧的刑事工具，可能加强跨境配合执法和证据交换。
summary.en: The U.S. FEPA adds criminal tools against foreign officials who solicit or receive bribes, potentially strengthening cross-border cooperation and evidence sharing.

facts.zh: 企业面对索贿时既要避免付款，也要有升级、记录、拒绝和替代业务路径。
facts.en: When facing solicitation, companies need escalation, recordkeeping, refusal protocols, and alternative business paths, not only a no-payment rule.

complianceLessons.zh: 第三方和政府接触记录应包含会议纪要、礼品招待、折扣理由、费用审批和异常拒绝记录。
complianceLessons.en: Third-party and government-contact files should contain meeting notes, gifts and hospitality, discount rationales, expense approvals, and records of suspicious refusals.

sources.label: U.S. DOJ FCPA resources

title.zh: 中国数据出境新规：低风险场景放宽但台账责任更重要
title.en: China cross-border data rules: low-risk relief but stronger register discipline

summary.zh: 中国2024年数据出境规则放宽部分低风险场景，但企业仍需识别个人信息、重要数据、传输机制和豁免条件。
summary.en: China's 2024 cross-border data rules eased some low-risk scenarios, but firms still need to classify personal information, important data, transfer mechanisms, and exemptions.

facts.zh: 出海企业通常同时面对中国数据出境、欧盟GDPR和东道国本地化要求。
facts.en: Outbound companies often face Chinese data-export rules, EU GDPR, and host-state localization requirements at the same time.

complianceLessons.zh: 产品出海前应建立数据地图，逐项判断安全评估、标准合同、认证、豁免或本地化。
complianceLessons.en: Before overseas launch, build a data map and assess security review, standard contracts, certification, exemption, or localization for each flow.

sources.label: Cyberspace Administration of China
China State Council policy database

title.zh: 《网络数据安全管理条例》生效：数据合规进入运营治理
title.en: Network Data Security Management Regulation: data compliance enters operating governance

summary.zh: 条例生效后，网络数据处理者的数据分类、重要数据、个人信息和安全管理义务更具体。
summary.en: After the regulation took effect, network data processors face more concrete duties on classification, important data, personal information, and security management.

facts.zh: 中企出海不能只看目的地法，还要把中国法下的数据出境和安全义务作为产品架构前置条件。
facts.en: Chinese companies going global cannot look only at destination law; Chinese data-export and security duties must be front-loaded into product architecture.

complianceLessons.zh: 把数据分类、权限、日志、供应商访问和事件响应写入研发与运营流程。
complianceLessons.en: Embed data classification, permissions, logs, vendor access, and incident response into development and operations workflows.

sources.label: China State Council policy database

title.zh: 电池供应链的复合风险：碳、矿产、人权与补贴
title.en: Battery supply-chain compound risk: carbon, minerals, human rights, and subsidies

summary.zh: 新能源车和电池出海同时触发反补贴、碳数据、关键矿产、人权尽调和产品安全要求。
summary.en: EV and battery expansion triggers counter-subsidy, carbon-data, critical-mineral, human-rights diligence, and product-safety requirements together.

facts.zh: 单一法律问题往往只是表层；真实风险来自贸易救济、ESG、供应链和政治叙事叠加。
facts.en: A single legal issue is often only the surface; the real risk lies in trade remedies, ESG, supply chains, and political narratives compounding.

complianceLessons.zh: 电池企业应建立材料来源、碳足迹、客户问卷、政府补贴和供应商劳工文件的一体化数据包。
complianceLessons.en: Battery firms should build integrated files covering material origin, carbon footprint, customer questionnaires, subsidies, and supplier labour records.

sources.label: European Commission, CBAM
European Commission, Chinese BEV countervailing duties

title.zh: 电池企业被安全名单化：客户采购和资本市场风险
title.en: Battery firms and security listings: customer procurement and capital-market risk

summary.zh: 中国电池企业面临美国安全名单、供应链审查和采购限制叠加，可能影响客户合同和融资。
summary.en: Chinese battery firms face overlapping U.S. security listings, supply-chain scrutiny, and procurement restrictions, affecting customer contracts and financing.

facts.zh: 即使名单本身不直接禁止交易，客户和金融机构也可能基于风险政策提前退出。
facts.en: Even when a list does not directly prohibit transactions, customers and financial institutions may exit early under risk policies.

complianceLessons.zh: 企业需要准备非军用业务说明、治理结构、供应链安全、客户问答和危机沟通材料。
complianceLessons.en: Companies need civil-use explanations, governance records, supply-chain security evidence, customer Q&A, and crisis communications.

sources.label: U.S. Department of Defense releases

title.zh: 墨西哥近岸制造：原产地、转运和USMCA合规
title.en: Mexico nearshoring: origin, transshipment, and USMCA compliance

summary.zh: 中企利用墨西哥进入北美市场，需要证明实质性加工、原产地规则和非规避贸易救济。
summary.en: Chinese companies using Mexico for North American access must prove substantial transformation, origin-rule compliance, and non-circumvention of trade remedies.

facts.zh: 近岸化不是简单换标签；税关、劳动价值含量、供应链和政治压力都会进入审查。
facts.en: Nearshoring is not relabeling; customs, labour-value content, supply chains, and political pressure enter review.

complianceLessons.zh: 企业应保留BOM、工序、工时、采购、物流和成本资料，证明当地实质性生产。
complianceLessons.en: Companies should retain BOM, process, labour-hour, procurement, logistics, and cost records to prove substantial local production.

sources.label: U.S. Customs and Border Protection, USMCA

title.zh: 欧盟AI法案：AI产品出海的风险分级与文档义务
title.en: EU AI Act: risk classification and documentation duties for AI products abroad

summary.zh: 欧盟AI法案以风险分级方式规制AI系统，影响中国AI、SaaS、智能硬件和平台服务进入欧洲。
summary.en: The EU AI Act regulates AI systems by risk category, affecting Chinese AI, SaaS, connected devices, and platform services entering Europe.

facts.zh: 高风险系统、通用AI模型、透明度和数据治理义务会要求企业准备技术文档、风险管理和合规声明。
facts.en: High-risk systems, general-purpose AI models, transparency, and data-governance duties require technical documentation, risk management, and conformity statements.

legalIssues: AI风险分级 / AI risk classification

complianceLessons.zh: AI服务出海要把模型用途、训练数据、评估、日志、人工监督和用户说明做成产品文档。
complianceLessons.en: AI services going abroad should document model use, training data, evaluations, logs, human oversight, and user instructions as product files.

sources.label: European Commission, AI Act

title.zh: 多边开发银行制裁：一次腐败或欺诈可影响全球投标资格
title.en: MDB sanctions: one corruption or fraud case can affect global bidding eligibility

summary.zh: 世界银行等多边开发银行的制裁和交叉禁入机制会把单个项目违规放大全球采购风险。
summary.en: World Bank and other MDB sanctions and cross-debarment mechanisms can turn one project violation into global procurement risk.

facts.zh: 海外基础设施企业需要管理投标代理、当地顾问、分包商、发票和项目变更。
facts.en: Overseas infrastructure firms must control bid agents, local consultants, subcontractors, invoices, and variation orders.

legalIssues: 欺诈腐败 / fraud and corruption

complianceLessons.zh: 政府采购项目应使用独立投标审查、第三方尽调、付款审批和举报机制。
complianceLessons.en: Public procurement projects should use independent bid review, third-party due diligence, payment approvals, and whistleblowing mechanisms.

sources.label: World Bank sanctions system
World Bank debarred firms list

title.zh: 红海航运中断：政治安全事件如何进入合同履行
title.en: Red Sea shipping disruption: how security events enter contract performance

summary.zh: 红海安全事件导致绕航、保险、交期和成本变化，说明政治风险会通过物流合同、交付条款和不可抗力进入商业纠纷。
summary.en: Red Sea security events caused rerouting, insurance, timing, and cost changes, showing political risk entering disputes through logistics contracts, delivery terms, and force majeure.

facts.zh: 中企出口欧洲、非洲和中东时，需要把航线安全、保险、延误、制裁和买方索赔纳入合同管理。
facts.en: Chinese exporters to Europe, Africa, and the Middle East need to manage route security, insurance, delay, sanctions, and buyer claims contractually.

complianceLessons.zh: 合同应明确Incoterms、绕航费用、延误通知、保险责任和替代履行方案。
complianceLessons.en: Contracts should specify Incoterms, rerouting costs, delay notices, insurance responsibilities, and alternative performance plans.

sources.label: International Maritime Organization security page

title.zh: 替代支付与制裁风险：去美元化不等于无合规风险
title.en: Alternative payments and sanctions risk: de-dollarization does not eliminate compliance risk

summary.zh: 企业使用替代币种、离岸账户或第三国支付通道时，仍需关注制裁、反洗钱、税务和受益所有人风险。
summary.en: When firms use alternative currencies, offshore accounts, or third-country payment channels, sanctions, AML, tax, and beneficial-owner risks remain.

facts.zh: 复杂付款路径常被监管者视为规避、腐败或洗钱红旗，尤其在高风险地区和政府项目中。
facts.en: Complex payment routes are often seen as evasion, corruption, or money-laundering red flags, especially in high-risk regions and government projects.

complianceLessons.zh: 付款结构应与合同、发票、物流、受益人和服务成果一致，并接受制裁与AML筛查。
complianceLessons.en: Payment structures should match contracts, invoices, logistics, beneficiaries, and service outputs, and should pass sanctions and AML screening.

sources.label: OFAC sanctions programs
FATF guidance and publications

title.zh: 华为实体清单案：出口管制如何重塑全球供应链
title.en: Huawei Entity List case: export controls reshaping global supply chains

summary.zh: 美国BIS将华为及其多家关联公司列入实体清单后，芯片、软件、设备和云服务供应链均被许可证制度重塑，成为中企技术出海的标志性案例。
summary.en: BIS placement of Huawei and affiliates on the Entity List reshaped semiconductor, software, equipment, and cloud-service supply chains through license requirements.

facts.zh: 2019年5月，美国商务部工业与安全局以国家安全和外交政策利益为由，把华为及68家非美国关联公司列入实体清单；2020年又扩大对非美国关联公司和直接产品规则的适用。
facts.en: In May 2019 BIS added Huawei and 68 non-U.S. affiliates to the Entity List on national security and foreign-policy grounds; later actions expanded affiliate coverage and direct-product controls.

complianceLessons.zh: 高科技企业不能只做客户端制裁筛查，还要建立产品、软件、技术、云服务和第三国制造环节的出口管制地图。
complianceLessons.en: Technology companies need export-control mapping across products, software, technology, cloud services, and third-country manufacturing, not only customer screening.

sources.label: Federal Register, addition of Huawei entities to Entity List
Federal Register, Huawei non-U.S. affiliates and direct-product rule updates

title.zh: 孟晚舟DPA案：制裁、银行合规与高管个人风险
title.en: Meng Wanzhou DPA: sanctions, bank compliance, and executive exposure

summary.zh: 华为高管孟晚舟在美国刑事案件中达成延期起诉协议，显示制裁相关陈述、银行关系和跨境引渡可以把公司风险转化为个人刑事风险。
summary.en: The deferred prosecution agreement in the Meng Wanzhou case shows how sanctions-related representations and banking relationships can create personal criminal exposure.

facts.zh: 美国司法部称孟晚舟承认在与全球金融机构沟通时作出误导性陈述；案件经加拿大引渡程序后以延期起诉协议解决。
facts.en: The DOJ stated that Meng admitted misleading a global financial institution; after Canadian extradition proceedings, the matter was resolved through a deferred prosecution agreement.

legalIssues: 制裁合规陈述 / sanctions representations

complianceLessons.zh: 涉及受制裁国家、受控技术或敏感交易时，企业对银行、审计师、交易对手和监管者的陈述必须有事实底稿和高管审阅机制。
complianceLessons.en: When sanctioned jurisdictions, controlled technology, or sensitive transactions are involved, statements to banks, auditors, counterparties, and regulators need factual files and executive review.

sources.label: U.S. DOJ, Meng Wanzhou deferred prosecution agreement announcement

title.zh: 华为英国5G移除决定：盟友制裁如何改变市场准入
title.en: Huawei UK 5G removal decision: allied sanctions changing market access

summary.zh: 英国要求运营商停止采购新华为5G设备并在2027年前移除既有设备，说明第三国制裁会通过本国网络安全评估改变企业准入。
summary.en: The UK required operators to stop buying new Huawei 5G equipment and remove existing gear by 2027, showing how allied sanctions can alter domestic security assessments.

facts.zh: 英国政府称该决定基于国家网络安全中心对美国制裁影响的技术审查，并设定新采购禁令和既有设备移除期限。
facts.en: The UK government said the decision followed National Cyber Security Centre advice on the impact of U.S. sanctions and set both purchase and removal deadlines.

legalIssues: 网络安全审查 / cybersecurity review
政府采购限制 / procurement restriction
既有合同调整 / legacy contract adjustment

complianceLessons.zh: 关键基础设施供应商要把盟友制裁、技术可替代性、售后支持和本地客户合同退出成本纳入准入风险评估。
complianceLessons.en: Critical-infrastructure suppliers should assess allied sanctions, technical substitutability, support obligations, and customer exit costs as market-access risks.

sources.label: UK government, Huawei to be removed from UK 5G networks by 2027

title.zh: 德国5G组件退出安排：华为、中兴面对欧洲网络主权审查
title.en: Germany 5G component phase-out: Huawei and ZTE under European network-sovereignty scrutiny

summary.zh: 德国与运营商达成安排，要求在2026年前移除5G核心网中的华为、中兴关键组件，并在2029年前处理接入和传输网关键管理系统。
summary.en: Germany agreed with operators to remove Huawei and ZTE critical components from 5G core networks by 2026 and critical management systems by 2029.

facts.zh: 德国联邦内政部把该安排称为提升5G安全和技术主权的措施，直接影响设备供应商、运营商和长期维护合同。
facts.en: Germany's Interior Ministry framed the arrangement as strengthening 5G security and technological sovereignty, affecting vendors, operators, and long-term maintenance contracts.

complianceLessons.zh: 设备企业在欧洲要准备分阶段退出、替代供应、源代码和安全保证材料，并评估服务收入和客户索赔风险。
complianceLessons.en: Equipment vendors in Europe need phase-out plans, replacement supply options, source-code and security assurance materials, and analysis of service-revenue and customer-claim risks.

sources.label: German Federal Ministry of the Interior, 5G security announcement
BMI German notice on Huawei and ZTE 5G components

title.zh: 中兴2017年美国制裁与出口管制和解：第三方通道不是避风港
title.en: ZTE 2017 U.S. sanctions and export-control settlement: third-party channels are not safe harbors

summary.zh: 中兴因向伊朗等受限目的地输送美国原产物项并使用第三方安排而与美国DOJ、BIS和OFAC达成总额巨大的和解。
summary.en: ZTE reached major settlements with DOJ, BIS, and OFAC over shipments of U.S.-origin items to restricted destinations using third-party arrangements.

facts.zh: 美国司法部称中兴同意认罪并支付刑事罚金和没收款；美国政府合计处罚和暂缓罚款达到约11.9亿美元。
facts.en: The DOJ stated that ZTE agreed to plead guilty and pay criminal fines and forfeiture; the combined U.S. government penalty and suspended amount reached about USD 1.19 billion.

legalIssues: 美国原产物项 / U.S.-origin items

complianceLessons.zh: 出口管制合规必须覆盖集团销售、代理商、维修、备件、最终用户和付款路径，并保留真实、完整的内部调查记录。
complianceLessons.en: Export-control compliance must cover group sales, agents, repairs, spare parts, end users, and payment routes, with complete and accurate investigation records.

sources.label: U.S. DOJ, ZTE guilty plea and penalties
OFAC, ZTE settlement

title.zh: 中兴拒绝令危机：合规承诺违约会转化为生存风险
title.en: ZTE denial-order crisis: breach of compliance undertakings can become existential risk

summary.zh: BIS曾激活对中兴的拒绝令，禁止其获取受美国管辖的物项，随后在追加和解、罚款、托管和合规承诺后终止。
summary.en: BIS activated a denial order against ZTE, cutting access to U.S.-jurisdiction items, then terminated it after additional settlement terms, penalties, escrow, and compliance undertakings.

facts.zh: 2018年拒绝令暴露了中兴对美国芯片、软件和零部件的依赖；终止令要求额外付款、合规监督和其他条件。
facts.en: The 2018 denial order exposed ZTE's dependence on U.S. chips, software, and components; termination required additional payment, compliance oversight, and other conditions.

legalIssues: 暂缓处罚条件 / suspended penalty conditions

complianceLessons.zh: 和解后的合规义务不是形式文件，纪律处分、董事会监督、审计和监管报告一旦失真，可能触发更严厉的工具。
complianceLessons.en: Post-settlement undertakings are not paperwork: inaccurate discipline, board oversight, audits, or regulator reporting can trigger harsher tools.

sources.label: Federal Register, ZTE denial order termination

title.zh: TikTok加拿大国家安全审查：从清盘命令到具有约束力承诺
title.en: TikTok Canada national security review: from wind-up order to binding undertakings

summary.zh: 加拿大曾命令TikTok加拿大业务清盘，后续进一步国家安全审查允许投资在新的具有法律约束力承诺下继续推进。
summary.en: Canada first ordered TikTok's Canadian business wound up, then after further national security review permitted the investment to proceed subject to new legally binding undertakings.

facts.zh: 加拿大政府依据《加拿大投资法》进行国家安全审查，关注ByteDance在加拿大设立和运营TikTok Technology Canada带来的特定风险。
facts.en: Canada reviewed TikTok Technology Canada under the Investment Canada Act, focusing on specific national security risks related to ByteDance operations in Canada.

legalIssues: 投资国家安全审查 / investment national security review
平台本地实体 / local platform entity

complianceLessons.zh: 平台企业设立海外子公司时，应把治理隔离、数据访问、政府沟通和承诺履行机制作为交易文件的一部分。
complianceLessons.en: When platforms establish foreign subsidiaries, governance separation, data access, government engagement, and undertaking compliance should be built into transaction documents.

sources.label: Canada, wind-up order for TikTok Technology Canada
Canada, further national security review of TikTok Canada

title.zh: TikTok儿童隐私诉讼：COPPA合规成为平台产品治理问题
title.en: TikTok children's privacy lawsuit: COPPA compliance as platform product governance

summary.zh: 美国FTC调查后由司法部起诉TikTok和ByteDance，指控其违反儿童在线隐私保护规则和既有命令。
summary.en: After an FTC investigation, the DOJ sued TikTok and ByteDance alleging violations of COPPA and an existing order.

facts.zh: 监管机关称TikTok明知有大量13岁以下儿童使用常规应用，仍存在数据收集、账号处理和家长删除请求方面的问题。
facts.en: Regulators alleged TikTok knew many children under 13 used the regular app and still had problems with data collection, account handling, and parental deletion requests.

legalIssues: 既有命令执行 / order compliance

complianceLessons.zh: 儿童隐私不是隐私政策问题，而是年龄识别、默认设置、内容推荐、广告、删除请求和工程日志共同构成的产品合规问题。
complianceLessons.en: Children's privacy is product compliance: age assurance, defaults, recommendations, advertising, deletion requests, and engineering logs must work together.

sources.label: FTC, lawsuit against TikTok and ByteDance
U.S. DOJ, TikTok COPPA lawsuit

title.zh: TikTok Lite奖励计划案：产品增长机制也要做系统性风险评估
title.en: TikTok Lite rewards case: growth mechanics require systemic-risk assessment

summary.zh: 欧盟委员会将TikTok永久撤回TikTok Lite奖励计划的承诺作成具有约束力的决定，凸显DSA对新功能和成瘾性设计的约束。
summary.en: The Commission made TikTok's commitment to permanently withdraw the TikTok Lite Rewards programme from the EU binding, highlighting DSA scrutiny of new features and addictive design.

facts.zh: 该程序在法国和西班牙推出后受到审查，欧盟关注TikTok是否在上线前完成了风险评估和缓解措施。
facts.en: After launch in France and Spain, the programme drew scrutiny over whether TikTok completed risk assessment and mitigation before rollout.

legalIssues: DSA系统性风险 / DSA systemic risk

complianceLessons.zh: 平台的增长机制、积分、游戏化和推荐功能应在上线前形成风险评估、未成年人影响分析和替代设计记录。
complianceLessons.en: Growth mechanics, rewards, gamification, and recommendation features should have pre-launch risk assessments, minor-impact analysis, and alternative-design records.

sources.label: European Commission, TikTok Lite rewards commitments

title.zh: Temu欧盟2亿欧元DSA罚款：风险评估不能是通用模板
title.en: Temu EUR 200 million DSA fine: risk assessments cannot be generic templates

summary.zh: 欧盟委员会因Temu未充分识别、分析和评估平台非法产品系统性风险而处以2亿欧元罚款。
summary.en: The European Commission fined Temu EUR 200 million for failing to properly identify, analyse, and assess systemic risks of illegal products on its platform.

facts.zh: 委员会称Temu 2024年风险评估过于泛化，未基于自身服务证据；神秘购物显示充电器、婴儿玩具等产品存在安全问题。
facts.en: The Commission said Temu's 2024 risk assessment relied on generic sectoral information rather than service-specific evidence; mystery shopping found safety issues in chargers and baby toys.

legalIssues: DSA风险评估 / DSA risk assessment
纠正行动计划 / remedial action plan

complianceLessons.zh: 平台必须用自身抽检、投诉、召回、商家处罚和推荐系统数据证明风险识别和缓解，不应只引用行业共性风险。
complianceLessons.en: Platforms must use their own testing, complaints, recalls, trader sanctions, and recommender-system data to prove risk identification and mitigation, not only sector-level risks.

sources.label: European Commission, Temu DSA fine

title.zh: Temu阿肯色州数据诉讼：消费者保护与移动端权限风险
title.en: Temu Arkansas data lawsuit: consumer protection and mobile-permission risk

summary.zh: 阿肯色州总检察长起诉Temu，主张其违反州消费者保护和个人信息保护法律，显示州级执法可成为平台合规压力源。
summary.en: The Arkansas Attorney General sued Temu under state consumer and personal-information protection laws, showing how state enforcement can pressure platform compliance.

facts.zh: 诉讼把Temu及其关联主体纳入被告，重点指向数据访问、披露、消费者误导和应用权限。
facts.en: The lawsuit names Temu and related entities and focuses on data access, disclosures, alleged consumer deception, and app permissions.

legalIssues: 州消费者保护法 / state consumer protection
个人信息保护 / personal information protection

complianceLessons.zh: 跨境电商App需要把权限调用、SDK、数据共享、暗黑模式和隐私披露纳入美国州法审查，而非只关注联邦法律。
complianceLessons.en: Cross-border e-commerce apps need U.S. state-law review of permissions, SDKs, data sharing, dark patterns, and privacy disclosures, not only federal-law analysis.

sources.label: Arkansas Attorney General, Temu lawsuit announcement

company: Temu / Shein and other foreign e-commerce platforms

title.zh: CPSC关注Temu、Shein：低价跨境电商的产品安全责任
title.en: CPSC scrutiny of Temu and Shein: product-safety duties for low-cost cross-border e-commerce

summary.zh: 美国消费品安全委员会委员要求评估Shein、Temu等外国电商平台如何履行消费品安全法义务。
summary.en: CPSC commissioners called for staff evaluation of how Shein, Temu, and similar foreign-owned platforms meet Consumer Product Safety Act obligations.

facts.zh: 监管关注平台上可购买的婴幼儿、儿童和其他高风险产品，以及平台、进口商、分销商和制造商之间责任如何分配。
facts.en: Regulatory concern includes baby, toddler, child, and other high-risk products available on platforms, and how responsibility is allocated among platforms, importers, distributors, and manufacturers.

legalIssues: 消费品安全 / consumer product safety

complianceLessons.zh: 平台要建立高风险品类禁限售、测试报告、召回、美国进口主体和售后事故报告机制。
complianceLessons.en: Platforms need restricted-category controls, testing reports, recall procedures, U.S. importer mapping, and incident-reporting mechanisms.

sources.label: CPSC Commissioners' statement on foreign e-commerce sites

title.zh: 拼多多App安全事件：应用商店治理与移动端信任风险
title.en: Pinduoduo app security incident: app-store governance and mobile trust risk

summary.zh: Google因安全担忧暂停拼多多App在Google Play的版本，并通过Play Protect处理被识别的恶意版本，显示海外平台规则可直接影响用户触达。
summary.en: Google suspended the Google Play version of Pinduoduo over security concerns and used Play Protect against identified malicious versions, showing app-store rules can directly affect market access.

facts.zh: 公开报道援引Google称，部分非Play版本被发现含有恶意软件；PDD Holdings年度报告和披露也显示其面临数据、隐私和平台政策风险。
facts.en: Public reports quoted Google as saying off-Play versions were found to contain malware; PDD Holdings filings also disclose data, privacy, and platform-policy risks.

legalIssues: 恶意软件识别 / malware identification
应用商店政策 / app-store policy

complianceLessons.zh: 移动应用出海要把权限最小化、第三方SDK、漏洞利用、应用商店政策和危机沟通作为工程合规的一部分。
complianceLessons.en: Mobile apps going abroad should treat permission minimization, third-party SDKs, exploit prevention, app-store policy, and crisis communications as engineering compliance.

sources.label: KrebsOnSecurity, Google suspends Pinduoduo over malware
SEC, PDD Holdings 2023 Form 20-F
Google Play Protect overview

title.zh: 瑞幸SEC会计欺诈案：海外上市公司的财务内控风险
title.en: Luckin SEC accounting-fraud case: financial-control risk for overseas-listed companies

summary.zh: 美国SEC指控瑞幸通过虚增收入、费用和经营亏损误导投资者，并以1.8亿美元罚款达成和解。
summary.en: The SEC charged Luckin with misleading investors by materially misstating revenue, expenses, and operating loss, resolving the case with a USD 180 million penalty.

facts.zh: 瑞幸曾在纳斯达克交易，事件导致退市、投资者诉讼和跨境审计信任危机，是中概股财务合规的关键案例。
facts.en: Luckin had traded on Nasdaq; the matter led to delisting, investor litigation, and a cross-border audit-trust crisis for China-based issuers.

complianceLessons.zh: 海外上市企业需要可审计的销售流水、费用凭证、关联方交易、内部举报和董事会审计委员会监督机制。
complianceLessons.en: Overseas-listed firms need auditable sales records, expense evidence, related-party controls, whistleblowing, and audit committee oversight.

sources.label: SEC, Luckin Coffee accounting fraud settlement

title.zh: 滴滴网络安全审查与退市：数据安全如何影响海外资本市场路径
title.en: DiDi cybersecurity review and delisting: data security affecting overseas capital-market paths

summary.zh: 滴滴在美国上市后遭遇中国网络安全审查和80.26亿元行政处罚，随后推进从纽交所退市，显示数据监管与海外融资高度联动。
summary.en: After its U.S. listing, DiDi faced China's cybersecurity review and an RMB 8.026 billion penalty, then pursued NYSE delisting, showing the link between data regulation and overseas financing.

facts.zh: 国家网信办称滴滴违反网络安全、数据安全和个人信息保护相关法律；公司SEC文件说明退市及未来境外上市可能需要监管备案和网络安全审查。
facts.en: CAC said DiDi violated cybersecurity, data security, and personal-information laws; company SEC filings described delisting and potential cybersecurity review for future overseas listings.

legalIssues: 网络安全审查 / cybersecurity review
个人信息保护 / personal information protection

complianceLessons.zh: 数据密集型平台筹划境外上市时，需要在申报前完成数据资产盘点、监管沟通、出境评估和重大风险披露。
complianceLessons.en: Data-intensive platforms planning overseas listings need data inventories, regulator engagement, export assessments, and material-risk disclosure before filing.

sources.label: CAC, DiDi cybersecurity review penalty decision
SEC, DiDi Form 6-K on delisting

title.zh: 阿里巴巴反垄断处罚：平台生态治理影响全球投资者披露
title.en: Alibaba antitrust penalty: platform ecosystem governance affecting global investor disclosure

summary.zh: 国家市场监管总局对阿里巴巴平台“二选一”行为作出处罚，阿里通过SEC文件披露英文处罚决定，体现本土执法与海外资本市场披露相互连接。
summary.en: SAMR penalized Alibaba's platform exclusivity conduct, and Alibaba furnished the decision through SEC filings, linking domestic enforcement and global capital-market disclosure.

facts.zh: 处罚决定要求停止违法行为并处以182.28亿元罚款，相当于阿里2019年中国境内销售额的4%。
facts.en: The decision ordered Alibaba to cease the conduct and imposed an RMB 18.228 billion fine, equal to 4% of Alibaba's 2019 China revenue.

legalIssues: 滥用市场支配地位 / abuse of dominance
平台排他安排 / platform exclusivity
上市公司披露 / issuer disclosure

complianceLessons.zh: 平台企业的商家规则、流量分配、促销排他和惩罚机制需要接受竞争法、合同法和证券披露三重审查。
complianceLessons.en: Platform merchant rules, traffic allocation, promotion exclusivity, and penalties need competition-law, contract-law, and securities-disclosure review.

sources.label: SEC exhibit, SAMR administrative penalty decision for Alibaba

title.zh: WeChat美国禁令诉讼：国家安全、言论和平台依赖
title.en: WeChat U.S. ban litigation: national security, speech, and platform dependence

summary.zh: 美国行政令试图限制与WeChat相关交易，引发用户诉讼并被法院初步禁令阻却，后续相关行政令被撤销。
summary.en: A U.S. executive order sought to restrict WeChat-related transactions, triggered user litigation and a preliminary injunction, and was later revoked.

facts.zh: 案件显示以国家安全为依据的平台禁令会同时涉及用户言论、商业支付、跨境社群通信和行政权力边界。
facts.en: The case shows that national-security platform bans can implicate speech, payments, cross-border community communications, and limits on executive power.

complianceLessons.zh: 面向海外社群和支付场景的平台要准备禁令响应、用户迁移、司法救济、政府沟通和商业连续性方案。
complianceLessons.en: Platforms serving overseas communities and payments need ban-response, user-migration, litigation, government-engagement, and business-continuity plans.

sources.label: Federal Register, Executive Order 13943 on WeChat
CourtListener docket, U.S. WeChat Users Alliance v. Trump
Federal Register, revocation framework for sensitive data orders

company: Alipay / Tencent QQ / WeChat Pay / WPS and other apps

title.zh: 支付宝、微信支付等连接软件行政令：支付和应用生态的国家安全化
title.en: Alipay, WeChat Pay, and connected-software order: national securitization of payments and app ecosystems

summary.zh: 美国行政令曾拟禁止与支付宝、QQ Wallet、WeChat Pay、WPS等中国连接软件有关的特定交易，虽后被撤销，但留下了数据安全审查模板。
summary.en: A U.S. executive order sought to prohibit certain transactions involving Alipay, QQ Wallet, WeChat Pay, WPS, and other Chinese connected apps; it was revoked but left a data-security template.

facts.zh: 该命令以敏感个人信息、商业信息和外国对手应用为核心叙事，后被拜登政府以更一般的数据安全框架取代。
facts.en: The order focused on sensitive personal data, commercial information, and foreign-adversary apps, and was later replaced by a broader sensitive-data review framework.

legalIssues: 行政令撤销 / revoked executive order

complianceLessons.zh: 支付和超级App出海要证明数据本地化、最小化、第三方共享、政府访问和美国用户数据保护安排。
complianceLessons.en: Payment and super-app businesses need proof of data localization or controls, minimization, third-party sharing limits, government-access controls, and U.S.-user data safeguards.

sources.label: Federal Register, Executive Order 13971 on Chinese connected software
Federal Register, Executive Order 14034 revoking prior app orders

title.zh: 腾讯1260H名单案：非制裁清单也会影响资本市场和客户采购
title.en: Tencent 1260H listing: non-sanctions lists still affect capital markets and procurement

summary.zh: 美国国防部将腾讯列入1260H“中国军事公司”名单，虽不等同于制裁，但会引发投资者、客户和合作伙伴的风险重评。
summary.en: The U.S. Department of Defense included Tencent on the Section 1260H Chinese military companies list; although not a sanctions list, it can trigger investor, customer, and partner reassessment.

facts.zh: 1260H名单公开识别被美国国防部认定在美国直接或间接运营的中国军事公司；市场通常把其视为未来限制的风险信号。
facts.en: The 1260H list publicly identifies Chinese military companies operating directly or indirectly in the United States; markets often treat it as a signal for possible future restrictions.

legalIssues: 资本市场风险 / capital-market risk

complianceLessons.zh: 被列名企业要快速准备事实反驳材料、业务边界说明、政府沟通、投资者问答和供应合同通知方案。
complianceLessons.en: Listed companies should rapidly prepare factual rebuttal materials, business-separation explanations, government engagement, investor Q&A, and customer-contract notification plans.

sources.label: U.S. Department of Defense, Section 1260H list release
DoD PDF, entities identified as Chinese military companies

title.zh: 商汤OFAC CMIC名单案：AI、人权和资本市场限制的交叉
title.en: SenseTime OFAC CMIC listing: AI, human rights, and capital-market restrictions intersect

summary.zh: 美国财政部将商汤识别为非SDN中国军工复合体公司，理由涉及监控技术和人权风险，影响美国投资者交易。
summary.en: The U.S. Treasury identified SenseTime as a Non-SDN Chinese Military-Industrial Complex company, citing surveillance technology and human-rights concerns that affect U.S. investor dealings.

facts.zh: OFAC称商汤控制从事中国监控技术行业的主体；相关清单虽非SDN冻结制裁，但限制美国人买卖相关公开证券。
facts.en: OFAC stated SenseTime owns or controls an entity operating in China's surveillance technology sector; the list is not SDN blocking sanctions but restricts U.S. persons' securities transactions.

legalIssues: CMIC证券限制 / CMIC securities restrictions
人权尽调 / human-rights due diligence

complianceLessons.zh: AI企业出海要准备用途管制、客户筛查、人权影响评估、数据集来源说明和投资者限制沟通。
complianceLessons.en: AI firms going global need use-case controls, customer screening, human-rights impact assessment, dataset provenance, and investor-restriction communications.

sources.label: U.S. Treasury, serious human rights abuse sanctions release
OFAC, Chinese Military Companies sanctions program

title.zh: 海康威视加拿大清盘命令：安防设备与投资国家安全审查
title.en: Hikvision Canada wind-up order: security equipment and investment national-security review

summary.zh: 加拿大在《加拿大投资法》国家安全审查框架下要求海康威视加拿大业务停止运营并清盘，凸显安防设备企业的本地运营风险。
summary.en: Canada ordered Hikvision's Canadian business to cease operations and wind up under the Investment Canada Act national security framework, highlighting local-operation risk for security-equipment firms.

facts.zh: 加拿大国家安全决定页面列明，总督会同行政局命令Hikvision Canada Inc.清盘其加拿大业务并停止所有运营。
facts.en: Canada's national security decisions page states that the Governor in Council ordered Hikvision Canada Inc. to wind up its Canadian business and cease all operations in Canada.

legalIssues: 国家安全审查 / national security review

complianceLessons.zh: 安防和物联网企业在海外要评估政府客户、云访问、固件更新、售后服务和本地雇佣安排的国家安全敏感性。
complianceLessons.en: Security and IoT companies abroad should assess the national-security sensitivity of government customers, cloud access, firmware updates, after-sales service, and local employment arrangements.

sources.label: Investment Canada Act, national security decisions

title.zh: FCC安全设备授权禁令：从采购限制进入市场准入限制
title.en: FCC secure-equipment authorization ban: from procurement restrictions to market-access restrictions

summary.zh: 美国FCC在安全设备法框架下限制被覆盖清单企业相关设备获得新的设备授权，影响通信、安防和物联网产品销售。
summary.en: Under the Secure Equipment Act framework, the FCC restricted new equipment authorizations for covered-list firms, affecting telecom, surveillance, and IoT product sales.

facts.zh: FCC覆盖清单列明被认为对美国国家安全构成不可接受风险的通信设备和服务；设备授权限制使清单风险从政府采购扩展到更广市场。
facts.en: The FCC Covered List identifies equipment and services deemed to pose unacceptable national-security risk; equipment-authorization restrictions extend list risk from government procurement to broader market access.

legalIssues: 进口销售限制 / import and sale restrictions

complianceLessons.zh: 硬件企业要在产品设计阶段确认射频、摄像、网络和云组件是否触发覆盖清单、认证、标签和进口限制。
complianceLessons.en: Hardware companies should check at design stage whether radio, camera, networking, and cloud components trigger covered-list, certification, labeling, or import restrictions.

sources.label: FCC Covered List
Federal Register, FCC supply-chain national security rule
